targets.query:
timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
bucket = if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 36h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 7d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_5min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 90d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 365d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_4h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 2190d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1d"
  else "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1w"
isRaw = timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h)
field = if isRaw then "usage_idle" else "usage_idle_mean"

from(bucket: bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == field)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["cpu"] == "cpu-total")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: 100.0 - r._value }))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "cpu_mean")

timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)

  |> set(key: "_field", value: "cpu_max")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "disk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == field)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["path"] == "/")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "disk_mean")

import "strings"

timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
bucket = if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 36h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 7d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_5min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 90d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 365d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_4h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 2190d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1d"
  else "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1w"
isRaw = timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h)
fieldSuffix = if isRaw then "" else "_mean"

from(bucket: bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "load1" + fieldSuffix
       or r["_field"] == "load5" + fieldSuffix
       or r["_field"] == "load15" + fieldSuffix)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if strings.hasSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_mean")
       then strings.trimSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_mean")
       else r._field }))

import "strings"

timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
bucket = if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 36h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 7d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_5min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 90d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 365d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_4h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 2190d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1d"
  else "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1w"
isRaw = timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h)
fieldSuffix = if isRaw then "" else "_max"

from(bucket: bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "load1" + fieldSuffix
       or r["_field"] == "load5" + fieldSuffix
       or r["_field"] == "load15" + fieldSuffix)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if strings.hasSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_max")
       then strings.trimSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_max") + "_max"
       else r._field + "_max" }))

import "strings"

timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
bucket = if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 36h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 7d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_5min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 90d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 365d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_4h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 2190d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1d"
  else "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1w"
isRaw = timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h)
fieldSuffix = if isRaw then "" else "_min"

from(bucket: bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "load1" + fieldSuffix
       or r["_field"] == "load5" + fieldSuffix
       or r["_field"] == "load15" + fieldSuffix)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: if strings.hasSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_min")
       then strings.trimSuffix(v: r._field, suffix: "_min") + "_min"
       else r._field + "_min" }))

timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
bucket = if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 36h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 7d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_5min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 90d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 365d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_4h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 2190d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1d"
  else "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1w"
isRaw = timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h)

rawBase = from(bucket: "INIT_BUCKET_NAME")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => isRaw)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_recv")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["interface"] != "lo")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)

rawMean = rawBase |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_recv_mean")
rawMin  = rawBase |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_recv_min")
rawMax  = rawBase |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_recv_max")

dsBase = from(bucket: bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not isRaw)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["interface"] != "lo")

dsMean = dsBase |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_recv_mean") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_recv_mean")
dsMin  = dsBase |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_recv_min")  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_recv_min")
dsMax  = dsBase |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_recv_max")  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_recv_max")

union(tables: [rawMean, rawMin, rawMax, dsMean, dsMin, dsMax])

timeAgoNs = uint(v: now()) - uint(v: v.timeRangeStart)
bucket = if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 36h) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 7d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_5min"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 90d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 365d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_4h"
  else if timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 2190d) then "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1d"
  else "INIT_BUCKET_NAME_1w"
isRaw = timeAgoNs <= uint(v: 3h)

rawBase = from(bucket: "INIT_BUCKET_NAME")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => isRaw)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_sent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["interface"] != "lo")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)

rawMean = rawBase |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_send_mean")
rawMin  = rawBase |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_send_min")
rawMax  = rawBase |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_send_max")

dsBase = from(bucket: bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not isRaw)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["interface"] != "lo")

dsMean = dsBase |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_sent_mean") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_send_mean")
dsMin  = dsBase |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_sent_min")  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_send_min")
dsMax  = dsBase |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "bytes_sent_max")  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max,  createEmpty: false) |> set(key: "_field", value: "net_send_max")

union(tables: [rawMean, rawMin, rawMax, dsMean, dsMin, dsMax])
